ValidationRule.description: This validation is to check whether Year is in proper format.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule ), OR(Not(ISNUMBER(CONTAINER_Year__c)), LEN(CONTAINER_Year__c) <> 4), OR($RecordType.Name = "CONTAINER FAQ", OR($RecordType.Name = "CAP", $RecordType.Name = "CONTAINER")) )
